programme.title: Shane the Chef
programme.desc: When JG's popcorn maker ruins the kids' favourite film in Munchington's first pop-up cinema, it is up to the kids to remember enough of the film to save the day. As for Shane, he has to save the movie

programme.title: Pajanimals: Not-So-Great Outdoors / Home Sweet Home
programme.desc: After a fun day outside, the Pajanimals are surprised to learn that Squacky didn't have a good time and has decided that he's never going outside again! / As the Pajanimals get ready for a big trip, they notice that Sweet Pea Sue is packing almost everything she owns because if she has to leave her home, she's taking it with her.

programme.title: Everything's Rosie
programme.desc: WILL dreams of flying like a bird.

programme.title: Everything's Rosie
programme.sub-title: How To Teach a Bear to Meet the Queen
programme.desc: BIG BEAR receives an invitation to have tea with the Queen!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Blame Game / What's Your Name?
programme.desc: Marcos accidentally breaks an Art Show project that Melanie has made. Afraid that she will be mad at him, Marcos doesn't tell anyone what he has done, but not admitting the truth makes him miserable.

programme.title: Cloudbabies: Sun Catches a Cold
programme.desc: Sun has caught a terrible cold so the Cloudbabies knit a scarf from moonbeams to keep him warm.

programme.title: Cocomelon: JJ's Animal Time: Bay Adventures and Pirates / Fairytale Escapades
programme.desc: Set sail on bay adventures and sing along to the pirate anthem! / Sing along with these classic fairytale tunes with animal friends!

programme.title: Boing: The Play Ranger
programme.desc: The Rangers have started their day with a blind-folded obstacle course they have put together for the town kids whom they expect any minute. But not one shows up!

programme.title: Boing: The Play Ranger
programme.desc: Tomorrow is the first ever Playville Super Speedster Race day. Elloo suggested Bing Bing to get a good night sleep so he can have plenty of energy for the next day.

programme.title: WordWorld: Runaway O / Happy Birthday, Dog!
programme.desc: When Sheep and Bear open Cat's box of Os, one rolls away, sending them on a madcap chase to catch it before Cat wakes up! / It's Dog's birthday and all his friends are planning a surprise party. There's just one problem - they need a cake!

programme.title: Bichikids: Hello My Friend, Let's Play Together
programme.desc: Enjoy, dance, sing and learn with Bichikids' best songs.

programme.title: Elias: Rescue Team Adventures: MONSTER OF THE DEEP
programme.desc: Trawler has been lording it over the younger boats, bragging about his exploits in his younger days. Elias, Swifty and Dippy decide to put Trawler's supposed heroism to the test. They invent a story a

programme.title: Luna Chip & Inkie Adventure Rangers Go: The Great Frog Unclog
programme.desc: It's a frogvasion! Eagle Creekers are finding frogs in vegetable bins at the General Store, under hats and even in their bathtubs! It looks like the citizens will have to move unless the Adventure Rangers can lure the little hoppers back to their home pond. But even dressing Chip up as a big, juicy mosquito doesn't draw the frogs away. Finally, the Rangers investigate why the frogs have moved and find that their pond is filled with litter! All they have to do is clean up that mess and everyone will be happy. Except for Chip, who is still dressed as that tasty mosquito.

programme.title: Meekah: Meekah's Dino Discovery
programme.desc: On a visit to the American Museum of Natural History, Meekah embarks on a search for a very specific dinosaur. Her toy dino is a T-Rex, but she wants to see just how big a T-Rex really is! Will she find a friendly dinosaur to match her toy?

programme.title: Angelina Ballerina: Angelina's New Ballet Teacher
programme.desc: The day for Angelina to meet her new ballet teacher, Ms. Mimi, has finally arrived and Angelina is thrilled! Angelina is unsettled when she learns that Ms. Mimi's teaching style is very different than

programme.title: Zou: Zou the Artist
programme.desc: There's to be an art competition in the park and Zou wants to enter. He paints a picture, only to find that Zinnia has done a painting too.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pup Tales
programme.sub-title: Pups Save Gustavo's Guitar / Pups Save The Yoga Goats / Pups Save Bedtime / Pups Save Chickalettas Egg / Mighty Pups Super Paws: When Super Kitties Attack / Pups Save a Manatee
programme.desc: Gustavo Goodway's guitar is missing. The pups need to find it before tonight's campfire concert!

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pup Tales
programme.desc: Mr. Porter and Alex are in a sticky situation - they're up to their ears in maple syrup! It's up to the PAW Patrol to save the Porters and Breakfast!

programme.title: Blippi Wonders: Astronauts / Library / Diwali
programme.desc: Blippi flies into outer space with D.Bo where they meet Rihanna the rocket. Blippi floats in zero gravity, eats astronaut food, and even performs a space walk to fix Rihanna۪s navigation system! / Blippi, Tabbs, and Babble meet Catie Caterpillar and go on a wild library cart ride through the library and past various sections of subjects until they finally arrive at the enormous room full of books all about dinosaurs! / Blippi, Meekah, and Tabbs go to India in this super colorful episode where they meet Deep the diya and work together to help him light the traditional lanterns for Diwali all while dancing to a Bollywood beat.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse: Build DJ Catnip's Music Room! / Crafting a Miniature MerCat's Bathroom!
programme.desc: In today's video we are DIYing DJ Catnip's Music Room from Gabby's Dollhouse! Tune in and watch as we get crafty, making mini versions of all the cat-tastic rooms of the dollhouse! Time to get tiny, and time to get funky! / In today's video we are DIYing MerCat's bathroom from Gabby's Dollhouse! Tune in and watch as we get crafty, making mini versions of all the cat-tastic rooms of the dollhouse!

programme.title: HobbyKidsTV
programme.desc: Come along for the fun with popular YouTube family, HobbyKidsTV! Plus, HobbyKids Adventures!

programme.title: EvanTubeHD
programme.desc: Share in the fun with YouTube star EvanTubeHD, his sister JillianTubeHD, and the whole Tube Family!

programme.title: HobbyKidsTV
programme.desc: Come along for the fun with popular YouTube family, HobbyKidsTV! Plus, HobbyKids Adventures!

programme.title: JillianTubeHD
programme.desc: Join YouTube star, JillianTubeHD, as she makes everything from delicious desserts to gold, glittery slime!

programme.title: Toys and Colors
programme.desc: Toys and Colors teaches kids life skills, letters, numbers, and more – all in a fun and family-friendly way!

programme.title: Kids Diana Show
programme.desc: Kid video superstar, Diana, and her brother, Roma, take you along on all their pretend play adventures!

programme.title: Challenge Squad
programme.desc: Challenge Squad takes on the most epic challenges, featuring your favorite YouTube stars!

programme.title: KidCity
programme.desc: Play along with the KidCity family —Little Flash, Ava, DadCity, and MomCity— in all their kid-friendly games!

programme.title: Leading Ladies
programme.desc: Leading Ladies reflects how guilt affects us in different ways based on our perspective or memories. A welcome dinner is the excuse to discover that we always keep a secret from who know us the best. Five points of view that show us that each of these five girls tries, as best they can, to lead their own lives. Some lies have been saved for years, other where hidden for months… But many of them will come to light during this special meeting.

programme.title: It's A Wonderful Afterlife
programme.desc: Finding the perfect son-in-law can be murder. Mrs Sethi can't bear the thought of her daughter being alone and unhappy... she would make a great wife for some lucky man, if only she were given a chance. So when she can no longer stomach the rudeness of families who refuse her daughter, Mrs Sethi takes matters into her own hands with the only way she knows... Suddenly a police hunt begins for a serial murderer who cooks a killer curry.

programme.title: Instructions Not Included
programme.desc: Valentin is Acapulco's resident playboy, until a former fling leaves a baby on his doorstep and takes off without a trace. Leaving Mexico for Los Angeles to find the baby's mother, Valentin ends up finding a new home for himself and his newfound daughter. An unlikely father figure, Valentin raises Maggie for six years, while also establishing himself as one of Hollywood's top stuntmen to pay the bills, with Maggie hilariously acting as his on-set coach. But their unique and offbeat family is threatened when Maggie's mother shows up out of the blue, and Valentin realizes he's in danger of losing his daughter - and his best friend.

programme.title: Dick
programme.desc: The year is 1972 and like most high-school students, Betsy Jobs (Kirsten Dunst) and Arlene Lorenzo (Michelle Williams) just want to have a good time. But when, during a class field trip to the White House, they cluelessly wander into a behind-closed-doors, top-secret shredding session, it's time toboth wag the dog, and walk it. Seeking to uncover just how much the witless duo discovered, the Commander-In-Chief, appoints them "Official White House Dog Walkers," and it isn't long before the girls go from taking out Checkers, to taking out Tricky Dick, in this fun-raising comedy of historic distortions.

programme.title: Project Wolf Hunting
programme.desc: During an extradition to South Korea, a group of dangerous criminals unite to stage a coordinated escape attempt from their floating prison. As the jailbreak escalates into a bloody riot, the fugitives and their allies from the outside exact a brutal terror campaign against the special agents onboard the cargo ship. But the prisoners aren't the only ones waiting to rise from the darkness.

programme.title: Precious
programme.desc: Best Supporting Actress Academy Award and BAFTA winner for Mo'Nique. A vibrant, honest and resoundingly hopeful film about the human capacity to grow and overcome. Set in 1987 it is the story of Claireece 'Precious' Jones (Gabourey Sidibe) a sixteen year old girl born into a life no one would want. She's pregnant for the second time by her absent father, at home, she must wait hand and foot on her mother (Mo'Nique) a poisonously angry woman who abuses her emotionally and physically. School is a place of chaos and Precious can neither read nor write, but expulsion leads to a life-line in an alternative school and a teacher who will help Precious on a journey from darkness, pain and powerlessness to light, love and self determination.

programme.title: Cold Brook
programme.desc: One fateful evening, after working late hours at the museum, two maintenance workers see a man standing silently near a Civil War exhibit. Despite chasing him away, each night he returns. Soon Ted and George learn that no one else can see the mysterious figure dressed in centuries-old clothing his name is Gil Le Doux and he's searching for a way home.

programme.title: Priceless
programme.desc: Set against the wildly atmospheric backdrop of the French Riviera, Jean (Gad Elmaleh), a shy young bartender is mistaken for a millionaire by beautiful scheming opportunist Irene (Audrey Tautou). Abandoned when she discovers his true identity, a love-struck Jean has no intention of letting someone this gorgeous get away! Jean's comical attempts to gain Irene's affection gradually evolve to him setting himself up as a gigolo at the luxury hotel she is staying at...and then the fun really begins. A sexy and thoroughly charming romantic comedy, if you love Breakfast at Tiffany's, you'll love this.

programme.title: I Kill Giants
programme.desc: Barbara Thorson (Madison Wolfe) is a teenage girl who escapes the realities of school and a troubled family life by retreating into her magical world of fighting evil giants. With the help of her new friend Sophia (Sydney Wade) and her school counsellor (Zoe Saldana), Barbara learns to face her fears and battle the giants that threaten her world.

programme.title: Universal Soldier II: Brothers In Arms
programme.desc: Luc and Veronica recover and revive Luc's long-lost brother who has been suspended in a cryo-chamber for decades and attempt to expose the Unisol program, led by Mazur (Gary Busey), which recycles dead soldiers.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: The Green Hornet: Bullets and Ballots
programme.desc: A newspaper publisher and his Korean servant fight crime as vigilantes who pose as a notorious masked gangster and his aide.

programme.title: Lucky Numbers
programme.desc: A television weatherman scams a local lottery.

programme.title: Errors of the Human Body
programme.desc: When a potentially lethal virus is created within his new lab, Dr Geoff Burton is shocked to discover he is not only the unwitting cause, but also its first victim.

programme.title: World Nature Heritage
programme.desc: Off the coast of Colombia in the Pacific Ocean lies the UNESCO World Heritage Site Malpelo

programme.title: Our Earth Our Oceans
programme.desc: Our Earth, Our Oceans is a cinematic ode to the forces of nature and their interaction. It is a visually compelling call to protect these forces, as they are necessary for survival for us and for generations to come.

programme.title: Dog Gone
programme.desc: A courageous boy battles a gang of bumbling thieves to rescue a dog carrying a fortune in stolen diamonds.

programme.title: Our Dream Wedding
programme.desc: Commitment-shy Natalie tries on her grandma's 'magical' wedding veil and is transported to her future, where she and long-term boyfriend Scott are happily married with two beautiful children. Is she finally ready to commit?

programme.title: Finding Grace
programme.desc: A troubled teenage girl is forced to provide community service in a retirement home. As she develops a friendship with one of the residents and becomes closer to her father, she discovers the power of family, hope and faith.

programme.title: Romance In The Air
programme.desc: After learning her marketing job is on the line, Eden returns to Lake Tahoe where she used to spend her summers growing up. Intending to relax and recharge so she can tackle her job again, she is surprised to find her childhood friend and sweetheart Riley is still living next door. She finds purpose in helping Riley propel his struggling hot air balloon tour company, and also finds herself drawn to him and their dear past. However, Eden sees Riley and Tahoe as temporary, while her life—and boyfriend—back home await her. She can't admit that she and Riley could have a future, even if that's exactly what she wants. When she's willing to take a risk for what her heart wants, her life will take off with her true love.

programme.title: Clemente Tragedy
programme.desc: Have you ever been unable to explain a wondrous event that changed your life at a critical moment where, perhaps, some other force was at work? This story and more from the beloved television series It's a Miracle.

programme.title: Heaven Is Waiting
programme.desc: It has been years since Ned Stevens, a charming self-made success, lost his wife Kate to cancer. Yet he still can't let go of her memory and move forward with his life.. But when Liz brings home a new boyfriend from college -- Ned finds that his comfortable world is turned upside down as Liz tries to divert his attention to Carol, an attractive single woman who lives in Ned's neighborhood.

programme.title: Payment in Blood
programme.desc: A gunman joins up with a gang of Confederate guerrillas to find a cache of missing Confederate gold.

programme.title: His Name Was Sam Walbash, But They Call Him Amen
programme.desc: A cruel and ruthless bandit kills a tavern owner who had ratted him out to the authorities.

programme.title: The Deadly Companions
programme.desc: An ex-army officer accidentally kills a woman's son and tries to make up for it by escorting the funeral procession through dangerous Indian territory.

programme.title: Santa Fe Passage
programme.desc: A disgraced Indian scout and his partner are hired to escort a wagonload of guns through Indian territory.

programme.title: 4 Wedding Planners
programme.desc: When Lily goes home to Hawaii, she wants to help save her family's wedding planning business, even when her ex-boyfriend shows up as a new client.

programme.title: Where Angels Fear to Tread
programme.desc: A story of a rich Edwardian widow who marries a handsome Tuscan dentist but dies in childbirth. Her English family travel to Italy in order to bring the child back home to England, but are unprepared for what unfolds...

programme.title: Meet My Valentine
programme.desc: Diagnosed with terminal cancer, Tom reconnects with his wife Valentine to create an online dating profile to secretly find her a replacement husband.

programme.title: Bride To Be
programme.desc: What if pain was merely a set up for the ultimate surprise party? Genie Burns, owner of Surprise Enterprise, masterminds surprise parties in nobody would-suspect-it locations. Here she takes crazy risks but in her love life, she plays it safe.

programme.title: Cinderella Pact
programme.desc: Nola, Deb, and Nancy are best friends who create a Cinderella Pact—a weight loss agreement using advice from "fairy godmother" newspaper columnist Bel.

programme.title: A Picture Perfect Wedding
programme.desc: Wedding photographer Lindsey gets her big opportunity when a New York mogul's son, Josh, asks her to shoot his sister's wedding. Sparks soon begin to fly as Josh and Lindsey start preparing for the wedding, forcing them both to realize how much they've been avoiding their real emotions. With the wedding preparations in full force, and prestigious guests arriving, Josh and Lindsey are now faced with a hard choice do they simply go back to the way their life has been, or will they take the risk of following one's heart?

programme.title: The Lancaster Bomber
programme.desc: THE LANCASTER BOMBER is a documentary about one of history's most iconic aircrafts - the Lancaster bomber - and its instrumental role in the defeat of Nazi Germany.

programme.title: Spy Cat
programme.desc: Spoiled and innocent, chubby house cat Marnie lives a comfortable and pampered life in the Sunshine household. She has never ventured outside the family home and only knows about the real world through her favourite detective, crime TV-shows. When Paul, who can't stand his sister's spoiled pet, abandons Marnie at a rural petrol station she comes across a loyal band of drifters who join forces to capture a notorious, local gang of petty thieves.

programme.title: Dino Time
programme.desc: Three kids find out that it really is a Jurassic world in this exhilarating family adventure, as they are transported back 65 million years into the prehistoric jungle! Including a stellar voice cast with Rob Schneider (Grown-ups), Melanie Griffith (Stuart Little 2), Stephen Baldwin (Fred Claus), William Baldwin (Forgetting Sarah Marshall) and Jane Lynch (Wreck-it-Ralph).

programme.title: The Great Gilly Hopkins
programme.desc: 12-year-old wisecracking Gilly Hopkins finds herself shuffled from foster home to foster home until she meets her new foster mother, Maime Trotter. In an effort to escape Maime's endless loving care, Gilly concocts a plan that she believes will bring her mother running to her rescue.

programme.title: Alexander Nevsky
programme.desc: The story of how a great Russian prince led a ragtag army to battle an invading force of Teutonic Knights.

programme.title: And Then There Were None
programme.desc: Seven guests, a newly hired personal secretary and two staff are gathered for a weekend on an isolated island by the hosts the Owens who are delayed. At dinner a record is played and the host's message alleges that all the people present are guilty of murder and suddenly the first of them is dead, then the next - It seems that one of them is the murderer but the leading person is always the person who is murdered next and at last only two people are left.

programme.title: Angel and the Badman
programme.desc: Quirt Evans, an all round bad guy, is nursed back to health and sought after by Penelope Worth, a Quaker girl. He eventually finds himself having to choose between his world and the world Penelope lives in.

programme.title: A Young Poet
programme.desc: Barely out of his teens, Rémi dreams of becoming a poet and thrilling the world with his powerful and unforgettable verse. Seeking inspiration in the oppressively hot city of Sète, pen and notebook in hand, Rémi is determined to write his poem.

programme.title: A Most Violent Year
programme.desc: In 1981 NYC, an immigrant (Oscar Isaac) and his family try to expand their business as rampant violence and corruption drag them in and threaten to destroy all they have built.

programme.title: Timeline: Timeline
programme.desc: Based on the Michael Crichton novel. TIMELINE tells the story of a professor who inadvertently catapults himself back to 14th-century France, in the middle of the 100 Years War.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Wolf Boy
programme.desc: Starring Chloë Sevigny and Eve Hewson. In the vein of Little Miss Sunshine, with a modern day fairy-tale surrealism that fans of Tim Burton will love.

programme.title: Felicias Journey
programme.desc: A young woman leaves Ireland to find her boyfriend in England, and while there is helped by a man hiding unsettling secrets.

programme.title: Night Raiders
programme.desc: Night Raiders is a relentless and thought-provoking, dystopian thriller from executive producer Taika Waititi (Thor: Ragnarok, JoJo Rabbit), which stars Alex Tarrant (The Lord of the Rings TV Series) and Amanda Plummer (Pulp Fiction, The Hunger Games: Catching Fire). In 2043, in post-war North America, a desperate woman joins an underground band of vigilantes to infiltrate a military-occupied institution to rescue her daughter who has become property of the state.

programme.title: The Immortal Wars: Rebirth
programme.desc: Rebirth takes place during the early brutal stages of Dominion Industries. In this story watch Olive and other deviants undergo a series of deadly experiments lead by Laurie Harvey and her team.

programme.title: Time Loop
programme.desc: A young Londoner scientist running experiments with his father in a quite Italian village, has to face the consequences of choices he hasn't made yet.

programme.title: Donovan's Echo
programme.desc: Donovan Matheson (Danny Glover) is a man trapped in the past. Once an esteemed physicist, he worked on the Manhattan Project but in the years that followed, he became engulfed in regret, which soon turned into an obsession with finding a way to use his work to do good. When his wife and child died in an accident Donovan blamed himself and his work for failing to stop it from happening. Thirty years on, Donovan returns to his home town, but instead of a welcome return he finds himself plagued by déjà vu and caught up in events that echo his family's tragedy.

programme.title: Dark Star
programme.desc: John Carpenter's pulp science fiction classic - this brilliantly clever and funny parody of Stanley Kubrick's 2001: A Space Odyssey, follows a warped intergalactic mission to blow up unstable planets. Four bored astronauts fill in time between missions catching up on their tans with the help of a sun-lamp, playing with a suspiciously plastic-looking alien mascot they are taking back to Earth and conversing with their female version of Hal. Things start to go horribly wrong when the spaceship computer misfires and a 'smart bomb' thinks it is God.

programme.title: A Man for Every Month
programme.desc: Blogger, Megan, tends to shy away from dating, but that all changes when her boss assigns her to vlog her dates for the eligible bachelor calendar. Now pushed out of her comfort zone, Megan must quickly learn the golden rules of dating.

programme.title: Against the Wild: Survive the Serengeti
programme.desc: Two kids and their dog must use all their skills to survive in the African bush after a plane crash.

programme.title: WWJD II The Woodcarver
programme.desc: A troubled youth vandalizes a church and winds up in a close association with the woodcarver whose work he destroyed.

programme.title: Anatomy of Deception
programme.desc: A district attorney who, tapped to replace the outgoing mayor, is stalked by a man who engineers her fall from grace, leading her to push back and beat him at his own game.

programme.title: Seduced by Lies
programme.desc: A successful businesswoman is relieved to move on from her obsessive ex when she meets a handsome oil heir. However, romance gives way to suspicion when she discovers someone is watching her every move.

programme.title: Romance and Cigarettes
programme.desc: Actor and filmmaker John Turturro wrote and directed this emotionally resonant blend of music and drama. Nick Murder (James Gandolfini) is an ironworker who has been married for years to Kitty (Susan Sarandon), who works as a seamstress and is the mother of Nick's three daughters. While Nick loves his wife, his head is turned by Tula (Kate Winslet), a sexy salesgirl at a lingerie shop, and soon they're having a passionate affair. When Kitty finds out about Nick's infidelity, she becomes enraged and kicks him out of the house, forcing him to decide what he really wants out of life and what is most important to him.

programme.title: Listen Out for Love
programme.desc: Peyton Pepper, a goal-driven podcast producer, is forced to mold Alex McKinney, a brash loose cannon, into her next star and create the perfect show to save both of their careers. That show comes in the form of finding Peyton's iconic idol, true love. But as the duo goes along for the ride, they are the ones who find love--once they open their hearts and listen.

programme.title: Love Wrecked
programme.desc: Jenny Taylor (Amanda Bynes) has found her ideal man who she just knows would sweep her off her feet. The only problem? He's Jason Masters (Chris Carmack), the world's biggest rock star. Hoping for a chance to get close to her idol, Jenny takes a job in his favourite Caribbean resort with her best friend Ryan (Jonathan Bennett). When Jason is washed overboard in a storm, Jenny jumps in to save him and the pair find themselves stranded on a seemingly-deserted tropical island.

programme.title: Love & Where to Find It
programme.desc: Two local coffee shop business owners despise each other in real life, but fall in love while unknowingly sending each other messages via a dating app on their friends' behalf.

programme.title: The Glass Castle
programme.desc: THE GLASS CASTLE chronicles the adventures of an eccentric, resilient, tight-knit family.

programme.title: The Dog Who Saved Summer
programme.desc: When Zeus accidentally destroys an important party, he gets sent to obedience school at the worst time!

programme.title: My Summer Prince
programme.desc: PR crisis manager Deidre and her assistant fly in when rebellious Prince Colin is arrested in small-town Idaho

programme.title: The Secret: Dare to Dream
programme.desc: A feature film adaptation of the self-help book, 'The Secret', which focuses on the power of positive thinking

programme.title: The Culling
programme.desc: When a group of college friends head out of town for a fun-filled long weekend, their plans change after finding a 7-year-old girl alone at an empty cafe along the highway and have no choice but to drive her home. When they arrive at her house it's quickly apparent they will have to stay the night - but what's not apparent is the living nightmare that they're about to encounter.

programme.title: Mara
programme.desc: A twisted, spine-tingling horror based on the ancient legend of the night hag demon - Mara. Criminal psychologist Kate (Olga Kurylenko: Quantum of Solace) is assigned to the murder of a man who has seemingly been strangled in his sleep by his wife and the only witness is their daughter. As Kate investigates she experiences the same petrifying symptoms and spirals through a chilling nightmare.

programme.title: Music
programme.desc: Golden Globe award nominee Music is the directorial debut from multi-Grammy Award nominee and global superstar Sia. Starring Academy Award nominee Kate Hudson, Tony and Grammy Award winner Leslie Odom Jr. and Sia-protégé Maddie Ziegler and Juliette Lewis. While on a journey of discovery, a newly sober woman becomes the sole guardian of her half-sister, Music, a young girl on the autism spectrum.

programme.title: That's Not Me
programme.desc: Introducing a heart-warming, fun-filled journey of self-discovery. Polly's dream of making it big as an actress are completely ruined, by none other than her identical twin who has landed a big role and risen to stardom. Now with everyone mistaking her for her famous celebrity sister, Polly decides to use this to her advantage…This reckless comedy completely steals the limelight.

programme.title: Papillon
programme.desc: A man wrongfully convicted for murder joins forces with a fellow inmate in an attempt to escape from a notorious penal colony. Starring Charlie Hunnam and Rami Malek (2017)

programme.title: A Focus To Kill
programme.desc: A woman is hired by her ex-boyfriend to manage his fortune. After an affair, she is forced to confront the fact that he may not be the man he once was. Starring Presciliana Esparolini (2018)

programme.title: Stranger In The House
programme.desc: A woman suspects her new stepmother of killing her father. Starring Emmanuelle Vaugier (2016)

programme.title: The Gourmet Detective
programme.desc: After a shocking murder at his friend's restaurant, a culinary expert uses his mastery of food, drink and cooking to solve the case. Stars Dylan Neal, Brooke Burns (2015)

programme.title: Deadly Vows
programme.desc: Pastry chef Helena poisons men who don't meet her high standards. Her fiancé's sister begins to be suspicious of her actions. Starring Brittany Underwood (2017)

programme.title: The Convenient Groom
programme.desc: Dr. Kate is a romance guru with a hit radio show. But when she is unexpectedly dumped by her fiancé during their engagement party, will someone come to the rescue and protect her dignity? (2016)

programme.title: Sunrise in Heaven [aka Forever Love]
programme.desc: A true story that spans over four decades between Jan and young G.I Steve, navigating family, faith, and love. You will be in for a roller-coaster of emotions. (2019)

programme.title: Strawberry Summer
programme.desc: A small-town music teacher invites a famous country singer to star at her town's Strawberry Festival. The pair grow increasingly closer when they discuss their hopes and dreams for the future. (2012)

programme.title: Love Afloat
programme.desc: Lorelei travels to the Caribbean after inheriting a sailboat from her late uncle.

programme.title: The Wedding Fix
programme.desc: Recently single Gwen helps to plan her best friend's wedding. But finalising the final details are complicated when she is teamed-up with laid back best man, Josh. Stars Andrea Brooks. (2021)

programme.title: World's Greatest Dad
programme.desc: World's Greatest Dad is a story about a man who learns that the things you want most may not be the things that make you happy. Robin Williams stars as Lance Clayton, a man who has learned to settle. He dreamed of being a rich and famous writer, but has only managed to make it as a high school poetry teacher. His only son Kyle is an insufferable jackass who won't give his father the time of day. Then, in the wake of a freak accident, Lance suffers the worst tragedy and the greatest opportunity of his life. He is suddenly faced with the possibility of all the fame, fortune and popularity he ever dreamed of, if only he can live with the knowledge of how he got there.

programme.title: My All American
programme.desc: Freddie Steinmark, an underdog on the gridiron, faces the toughest challenge of his life after leading his team to a championship season.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) are salesmen whose careers have been torpedoed by the digital world. Trying to prove they are not obsolete, they defy the odds by talking their way into a coveted internship at Google, along with a battalion of brilliant college students. But gaining entrance to this utopia is only half the battle. Now they must compete with a group of the nation's most elite, tech-savvy geniuses to prove that necessity really is the mother of re-invention.

programme.title: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Milo Boyd (Gerard Butler), a down-on-his-luck bounty hunter, gets his dream job when he is assigned to track down his bail-jumping ex-wife, reporter Nicole Hurly (Jennifer Aniston). He thinks all that's ahead is an easy payday, but when Nicole gives him the slip so she can chase a lead on a murder cover-up, Milo realizes that nothing ever goes simply with him and Nicole. The exes continually one-up each other – until they find themselves on the run for their lives. They thought their promise to love, honor and obey was tough – staying alive is going to be a whole lot tougher. Andy Tennant (Hitch, Sweet Home Alabama) directs.

programme.title: Lake Placid
programme.desc: Welcome to Black Lake. Its placid waters compliment the pristine Maine wilderness it borders. This tranquil setting is probably the last place you'd expect a gruesome fatality. But then it's also the last place you'd expect to find a 30-foot, narrow-snouted, multi-toothed, reptile of the species Crocodylus--an eating machine more commonly known as a crocodile.

programme.title: Chill Factor
programme.desc: A new biological chemical weapon that explodes up to temperatures over fifty degrees Fahrenheit, falls into the hands of two men who try to make sure that it doesn't get stolen by a terrorist.

programme.title: American Outlaws
programme.desc: When a Midwest town learns that a corrupt railroad baron has captured the deeds to their homesteads without their knowledge, a group of young ranchers join forces to take back what is rightfully theirs.

programme.title: Vantage Point
programme.desc: The attempted assassination of the president is told from five different perspectives.

programme.title: Vibes (1988)
programme.desc: A pair of mismatched psychics are thrown together on a mysterious mission in South America.

programme.title: St. Elmo's Fire
programme.desc: Featuring a fine ensemble cast including Demi Moore, Rob Lowe, Emilio Estevez and Andrew McCarthy, ST. ELMO'S FIRE follows the adventures of a group of friends in the years after their graduation from Georgetown University.

programme.title: Dr. Strangelove or: How I Learned to Stop Worriying and Love The Bomb
programme.desc: Wickedly dark comedy features Peter Sellers (in three roles) in the midst of impending nuclear war.Co-stars George C. Scott.

programme.title: Born Yesterday
programme.desc: Broderick Crawford wants his girlfriend Judy Holliday culturefied and hires William Holden to teach her in a hilarious Garson Kanin comedy set in Washington, D.C. Priceless Judy repeated Broadway triumph and won an Oscar for playing the quintessential dumb blonde

programme.title: Kill Your Darlings
programme.desc: A murder in 1944 draws together the great poets of the beat generation: Allen Ginsberg, Jack Kerouac and William Burroughs.

programme.title: Queen of the Desert
programme.desc: Gertrude Bell, a daughter of wealthy British parents, has no interest in the social life of the London elite. Balls, receptions, and the British aristocracy bring her only boredom. Aspiring to have at least some kind of activity in her life, Gertrude decides to find freedom and move to be with her uncle, who occupies a high diplomatic position in Tehran. So begins her lifelong adventure across the Arab world, a journey marked by danger, a passionate affair with a British officer, Henry Cadogan, and an encounter with the legendary T.E. Lawrence.

programme.title: A Memory In My Heart
programme.desc: Rebecca Vega doesn't remember anything of her life prior to waking up in a hospital eight years ago. Now that she and her husband Joe have begun trying to have a child, she has been plagued with headaches and recurring nightmares. After a fateful encounter with a curious stranger who claims to recognize her, Rebecca's memory is jolted when she sees a picture of herself and her three children. Armed with only the photo, the location of a small town, and the name Chase Stewart, Rebecca sets out to find some answers. Refusing to be intimidated by Stewart's threats and schemes, Rebecca slowly but surely uncovers the facts that allow her to reclaim her children and her past.

programme.title: A Perfect Day
programme.desc: An author discovers fame when his book skyrockets to the bestseller list. But the trappings of his success challenges his relationships to his wife and daughter and it takes a visit from a mysterious stranger telling him he has 40 days to live for him to get his moral bearings back.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Afterlife
programme.desc: In a world ravaged by a virus infection, turning its victims into the Undead, ALICE, continues on her journey to find survivors and lead them to safety. Her deadly battle with the Umbrella Corporation reaches new heights, but Alice gets some unexpected help from an old friend. A new lead that promises a safe haven from the Undead takes them to Los Angeles, but when they arrive the city is overrun by thousands of Undead - and Alice and her comrades are about to step into a deadly trap.

programme.title: There Be Dragons
programme.desc: Two men - childhood friends who become separated by the political turmoil of pre-war Spain only to find themselves on opposite sides when the war erupts. One becomes a priest, the other is an activist who becomes a spy for the fascist movement. As the battles are waged, the characters' lives collide and their deepest struggles are illuminated through the fateful choices they make.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: The science fiction thriller leaps into a new realm with JUMPER, which begins the epic adventures of a man who discovers that he possesses the exhilarating ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world he can imagine. From New York to Tokyo, from the ruins of Rome to the heart of the Saharan Desert, anywhere is possible for David Rice (HAYDEN CHRISTENSEN), until he begins to see that his freedom is not total, that he's not alone... but part of an ongoing, global war that threatens the very survival of his rare and extraordinary kind.

programme.title: 500 MPH Storm
programme.desc: At 500 MPH disaster is inevitable. When an experiment goes disastrously wrong, a rash of massive hurricanes rips across North America. A scientist must get his family to safety before the hurricanes merge, creating a "hypercane" with the power to wipe America off the map.

programme.title: Elektra
programme.desc: From the pages of Marvel Comics — creators of X-Men and Spider-Man — comes ELEKTRA, the first action-event movie of the year. In the ultimate battle between good and evil stands a warrior who makes the choice that tips the balance.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Kristina gets to tick off one of her bucket list dreams – the majestic Victoria Falls. Her guide Beano walks her through the history of the falls formation and they encounter some of the wildlife that live in the surrounding area. She zip-lines across the gorge and learns the integral role vultures play in the ecosystem.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Still at Victoria Falls, Kristina is treated to an aerial view of the Victoria falls. She gets up close and personal with prehistoric-looking beasts at the croc sanctuary, experiences some of the must-do tourist activities and has her first-ever encounter with endangered black rhino at the Stanley and Livingstone Private Game Reserve.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Hosted by Rhino Safari Camp, the epic safari continues back in the Matusadona National Park where Kristina is guided by Steve. They explore the lake-shore, encounter the hungry local pride and Marula, the resident elephant, makes a lunch-time appearance.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Kristina travels to Gonarezhou National Park in the South-East of Zimbabwe. Thomas, her guide, takes her to the breath-taking Chilojo cliffs, tracks an impressive buffalo herd and keeps his cool as they experience heart-stopping elephant charges. Will Kristina finally spot her dream leopard?

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Craig joins Kristina at Sango Lodge in the heart of the Save Valley Conservancy where they explore the vast, rugged wilderness. Kristina joins Byrce Clemence and his anti-poaching team as they demonstrate the effectiveness of the anti-poaching dog unit. Tracking notorious rhino on foot keeps their senses alert. Find out what causes the crew to hit the floor.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Back on the banks of Lake Kariba, Kristina is hosted by the luxurious Bumi Hills Safari Lodge. She tracks lions with her guide Madison, witness elephants swimming and challenges Madison to a fishing bet and finally gets to tick an elusive cat off her bucket list.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: The safari continues at Bumi Hills Safari Lodge where Kristina joins the anti-poaching unit on their everyday, thrilling duties. The fishing challenges with Madison continue and the breath-taking lakeshore game viewing experiences keep coming.

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Kristina travels back to Mana Pools to experience the untamed wilderness in the extreme dry season. Her guide, Cloud, takes her on an expedition to find lion cubs and wild dog puppies. Will they find what they are looking for?

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Still based at Zambezi Expeditions Camp, Richard guides Kristina into her closest encounter with a wild bull elephant. An evening excursion to Kanga Pan leads to breath-taking sightings of elusive creatures of the night

programme.title: Epic Safari Encounters
programme.desc: Kristina heads to Camp Amalinda on the edge of the Matopos National Park. Her guide, Dardley, shares some of the history of this World Heritage Site and intriguing rock paintings. They track white rhino on foot and she learns about the distinctive rock formations.

programme.title: Wild Moments: Wild Moments: Big Emotions
programme.desc: Nature has many weird creatures to offer and often these animals fascinate us the most. There are ants in Australia's outback that use specialised workers as living honey pots. In Africa in the endless Bangweulu wetlands of Zambia the shoebill is on the hunt for fish, a bird that definitely lives up to its name. Finally in the Brazilian rainforests lurk gruesome river monsters in the Amazon abyss that send shivers down the spine of even the most experienced divers. But there are also intense human-animal-relationships like the close bond between a German diver and a dolphin female who explore the Atlantic off the coast of Ireland, or the "easy rider" in California who has taken care of an African elephant bull for more than 25 years. Weird! is a breath-taking journey to visit animals around the globe who are somehow different.

programme.title: Wildlife Diaries Australia
programme.desc: Lone Pine Koala Sanctuary was opened in 1927 at a time when Koalas were still being killed on a large scale for the fur trade. Today, hardly anything threatens the natural habitats of these animals as much as the desertification of the forests. We let the drones fly and are there when a new tree is planted.

programme.title: Wildlife Diaries Australia
programme.desc: Visiting the fenced nature reserve Arid Recovery in southern Australia, we witness the care of an injured kangaroo and follow researchers at the Hidden Vale Wildlife Centre near Brisbane as they train native animals to detect tracks of threatening predators and then move to safety.

programme.title: Under the Spell of Horses: Under the Spell of the Horses
programme.desc: Iceland, the island of longing in the North. The biggest volcanic island in the world is known for its grandiose landscape, for its geysers and glaciers. But it is even more famous for its horses. Icelandic horses are considered the liveliest horses in the whole of Europe with the greatest stamina. They tölt over mossy banks and lava rock unfazed by rivers, glaciers and scree slopes. In Nordic mythology the steed are never far behind the warriors. Where would Siefgried be without his horse Grani, or Odin without Sleipnir. Even the sun wouldn't rise or set if “awake early” and “very quick” weren't pulling their chariot. From the beginning of colonisation, the Icelanders had the kind of close relationship with their horses usually only seen among the horse-riding peoples of Central Asia. And something of this love for horses still exists today. Life without horses would be unthinkable for Haukur Goroarsson, too. The 34-year old lives with his family in Vatnsdalur, a fertile valley in the North four hours by car from the capital city, Reykjavik. For him Icelandic horses are “a sort of Viking on four legs”. The settlement of this inhospitable island on the Arctic Circle would not have been possible without the animals. The stone deserts in the country's interior are too vast to be crossed on foot.

programme.title: Under the Spell of Horses: Under the Spell of the Horses
programme.desc: Proud elegance, silky-shiny coats and a graceful, powerful physique – the supreme Marwari horses have been worshipped in India as magical creatures for thousands of years. People say they descended directly from the Gods, that once when the Gods were sitting round the fire, there was so much soot that one of the Gods had to cry. One of the tears from his right eye changed into a stallion, and one of his tears from the left eye produced a mare. Ever since, the people in Rajasthan have believed that horses are Gods. Maharaja – palaces, temples and citadels, women in colourful saris and men with bright turbans – the land of the Rajas, the king's sons, arouse fantasies reminiscent of One Thousand and One Nights. Lively trading and war-related incidents from the past have led to the emergence of a unique horse culture in the region: Marwaris are the proud horses of the Indian Rajas. Each year in November, the small, barren desert oasis of Pushkar is transformed into a place of pilgrimage for millions of Indians. Everybody who is anybody on the horse scene in Rajasthan - Maharajas, breeders and horse masters - meets at the Pushkar Mela, the turbulent market for over 50,000 horses and camels. Pushkar is the place where the legendary Marwaris are bought and sold.

programme.title: Under the Spell of Horses: Under the Spell of the Horses
programme.desc: Once a year the royal city of Meknes is transformed into an oriental camp. Two thousand curious onlookers gather round the square. More than five hundred riders are expected to take part in this major Fantasia, a warlike display of horsemanship. 56-year old Lachsen Slimani is also obsessed with riding games. He lives with his family on a remote highland plateau in the Middle Atlas. Lachsen is proud because his 18-year old son Mohammed wants to follow in his father's footsteps. For that he needs his own horse, so the tradition goes. Lachsen wants to fulfil this dream for his son. So, in order to get the money together for the horse, he takes off on an adventure and is travelling to Quarzazate, which is also called the Hollywood of the desert.

programme.title: The Seychelles
programme.desc: The 115 islands and islets that make up the Seychelles present a breath-taking variety of plants, rare animals and beaches laced with palms. This is where the leg-endary Coco de Mer palm nuts grow with fruits weigh-ing up to 20 kilos and giant wild land turtles nibble away at mangrove fruits to their hearts content. The archipelago was first settled at the end of the 18th cen-tury. Today, a very colourful potpourri of peoples in this dwarf state proves just how peacefully different cultures can live side by side. Three times a week, the steamer "MV Espoir" completes the trip from the main island of Mahé to Praslin and back. A ship for every-one and practically everything: Used cars, toilet paper, horses, bicycles, furniture - you name it, the Espoir transports goods of all kinds. Coconuts sometimes pose a problem as there are far too many of them. What to do with them? The best place to send them is undoubt-edly Hubert Roumien's Virgin Coconut Oil Laboratory, hidden away in the Mahé jungle. Straw turns into gold at Seaweed Seychelles! There, Benjamin Port Louis collects seaweed and extracts liquid fertiliser from it.

programme.desc: From now on every stage of these series will be more than crucial. Curacao is a beautiful Dutch island in the Caribbean, with a great atmosphere to hold another stage of the MLO Strongman Champions League. Let's see who takes the title here and who will secure a place in the next stage.

programme.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 13, Jordan
programme.desc: Ten of the world's strongest men gathered in Amman to compete in Jordan's first-ever Truck-Pull Championship. The contestants race against the clock while pulling a 21-ton truck across the track. One of the most fierce competitors to take part in the event was four-time winner of the World's Strongest Man competition, Brian Shaw.

programme.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 14, Greece
programme.desc: Taking place in Corinth, Greece, considered by many the cradle of the sports competition games, an epic strongman battle will mark the last stage before the upcoming big two-day season's finale in Chetumal, Mexico. In front of more than 5000 spectators, the twelve athletes compete in Log Lifts, Card Deadlift, Conan's Wheel and Loading.

programme.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 15, Mexico World Finals (Part 1)
programme.desc: The first day of the two-part finale sees the strongest men competing in Carry and Drag, Dumbbell Lift and the Truck Pull. Everything is possible in this heated fight for the crown against the backdrop of stunning Chetumal, Mexico.

programme.title: SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 16, Mexico World Finals (Part 2)
programme.desc: On the second day of the grand finale of the 2017 Strongman Champions League, the athletes have a last chance to secure the medals in the spectacular four events Weight for Height, Deadlift Cars, Forward Hold and The Loading Medley. Be prepared for stunning performances – and even world records!

programme.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 1, Norway
programme.desc: Season 2018 begins with 14 strongest men in the world, all competing for the title. The competition kicks off in Norway. We'll see typical Viking disciplines, team events and world records in heavy conditions in the land of snow and ice. They will suffer, they will freeze and fight in this first competition of the year for the title that they will carry on their shoulders throughout whole year.

programme.title: SCL 2018 Season 5, Episode 2, Germany
programme.desc: The next stop in strongest league of the world is muscle capital, largest number of strong shoulders per capichampions league on the planet. It's a FIBO - the biggest expo on planet Earth and the second stage of 2018 Strongman champions league, in Cologne, Germany.
